operating_state: No specific Q1 2024 operating performance data was disclosed in the provided filing excerpts, which consist primarily of governance and capital market activities rather than quarterly financial results.
cost_structure: No Q1 2024 cost structure information was provided in the available filing excerpts, as the documents focus on regulatory filings for capital actions rather than operational financial metrics.
material_events: JPMorgan elected Mark Weinberger as director and Audit Committee member effective January 16, 2024. The board approved CEO James Dimon's 2023 compensation at $36 million, up from $34.5 million prior year. The firm completed $8.5 billion in debt offerings across floating and fixed-to-floating rate notes in January 2024. JPMorgan issued $2.5 billion in Series NN preferred stock in March 2024 and announced redemption of multiple preferred stock series totaling $600 million for April-May 2024.
